name: useTextDirection
description: Hook that can get and set the direction of the element
examples: const { ref, value, set, remove } = useTextDirection();

parameters.name: initialValue
parameters.description: The initial direction of the element

source.source: * @param {UseTextDirectionValue} [initialValue = 'ltr'] The initial direction of the element

tokens.name: [initialValue = 'ltr']
tokens.description: The initial direction of the element

returns.name: An
returns.description: object containing the current text direction of the element

source.source: * @returns {UseTextDirectionReturn} An object containing the current text direction of the element
